selected_feat.title: governed skill 接入与 pilot 验证流
selected_feat.goal: 把 governed skill 的接入、pilot、cutover 与 fallback 冻结成可验证的业务接入流，而不是把上线建立在口头假设上。
scope: 定义 governed skill 的接入、pilot、cutover 与 fallback 规则，让主链能力通过真实链路验证成立。
定义至少一条 producer -> consumer -> audit -> gate pilot 主链如何覆盖真实协作。
定义 adoption 成立时业务方拿到的 evidence、integration matrix 与 cutover decision。
constraints: pilot 链必须证明 ready job、runner、next-skill dispatch 和 execution outcome 这条自动推进链真实可用。
接入验证不得回退为人工第三会话接力。
cutover / fallback 必须围绕 runner 自动推进结果定义。
pilot evidence 必须绑定真实 approve -> runner -> next skill 链路。

acceptance_checks.scenario: Onboarding scope and migration waves are explicit
acceptance_checks.given: EPIC-SRC-003-001 requires real governed skill landing
acceptance_checks.when: FEAT-SRC-003-008 is reviewed for downstream planning
acceptance_checks.then: The FEAT must define onboarding scope, migration waves, and cutover / fallback rules without pretending all governed skills migrate at once.

acceptance_checks.scenario: At least one real pilot chain is required
acceptance_checks.given: Foundation FEATs are implemented in isolation
acceptance_checks.then: The FEAT must require at least one real producer -> consumer -> audit -> gate pilot chain instead of relying only on component-local tests.

acceptance_checks.scenario: Adoption scope does not expand into repository-wide governance
acceptance_checks.given: A team proposes folding all file-governance cleanup into this FEAT
acceptance_checks.when: The proposal is checked against FEAT boundaries
acceptance_checks.then: The FEAT must keep onboarding limited to governed skills in the mainline capability scope and reject warehouse-wide governance expansion.

architecture.reason: governed skill 接入与 pilot 验证流属于 execution runner 的集成边界扩展。

api.reason: 接入 governed skill 需要扩展 skill binding 与 pilot 验证契约。

tech.reason: governed skill 接入需要独立实现策略来处理 registry 绑定与 pilot 校验。

create_justification_summary: tech: TECH-SRC-003-008 -> governed skill 接入需要独立实现策略来处理 registry 绑定与 pilot 校验。 | signals: new reusable implementation strategy package, future multi-feat reuse
